Package com.example.edgers_lottery

package com.example.edgers_lottery
  • Class
    Description
    AdminHomeActivity
    Home screen for admin users providing navigation to all administrative sections.
    CreateEditEventActivity
    Activity for creating a new event or editing an existing one.
    CurrentUser
    Singleton helper class that holds the currently authenticated user in memory.
    EditProfileFragment
    Dialog fragment that allows a user to edit their profile information.
    Event
    Model class representing a lottery event.
    EventArrayAdapter
    Array adapter for displaying Event objects in a ListView.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Activity that displays the details of a single event to an entrant.
    EventDetailsOrganizer
    Activity that displays event details from the organizer's perspective.
    EventEntrantOrganizer
    Activity that displays the entrant management screen for an organizer.
    EventHistoryActivity
    Activity that displays the event history for the currently logged-in user.
    EventHistoryAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying a user's event history.
    EventHistoryAdapter.EventViewHolder
    ViewHolder that holds references to the event name and status TextViews for a single row.
    EventUserChoice
    Activity that allows a user to accept or decline an event invitation.
    EventWaitlistTab
    Activity that displays the waitlist management screen for an organizer.
    ExportNotificationsActivity
     
    FilterEventsFragment
    Dialog fragment that allows a user to filter events by interests and availability dates.
    HomeActivity
    Main home screen activity that displays a browsable list of events.
    ImagesViewActivity
     
    LoginActivity
    Activity that handles user login via Firebase Authentication.
    NewUserActivity
    Activity that handles new user account creation via Firebase Authentication.
    OrganizerHomeActivity
    Home screen activity for organizers.
    OrganizerListActivity
    Admin-only activity that displays a list of all organizer accounts.
    OrganizerListAdapter
    Adapter that populates the organizer list in OrganizerListActivity.
    OrgHomeActivity
    Home screen activity for organizers.
    ProfileActivity
    Activity that displays and manages the current user's profile.
    StartActivity
    Entry point activity that determines where to route the user on app launch.
    User
    Model class representing a user account in the Edgers Lottery system.
    User.Role
    Enum representing the possible roles a user can hold.
    UserListActivity
     
    WaitlistAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter that displays a list of waitlisted users.
    WaitlistAdapter.OnRemoveClickListener
    Listener interface for handling removal of a waitlisted user.
    WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder that holds references to the profile image, name, and remove button for a single waitlist row.
    WaitlistUser
    Model class representing a user entry on an event's waitlist.
